title: Withdraw Crypto
description: Select a coin, enter your address, and amount to withdraw. A 0.3% withdrawal fee applies
chooseWithdraw: Choose the cryptocurrency you want to withdraw
enterDetails: Enter your {{coin}} address and the amount you want to withdraw
warningAddress: Make sure this is correct. Withdrawals sent to wrong addresses cannot be recovered
feePercentage: A 0.3% withdrawal fee is applied to all withdrawals
successMessage: Your withdrawal request has been submitted. You will receive a confirmation email shortly
